PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FILE ITS OPPOSITION, IF IT HAS NOT ALREADY DONE SO, AND IMMEDIATELY DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE IN ACCORDANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. ORDER REGARDING DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT (OVERRULED IN PART, SUSTAINED W/O LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS RICHARD CROCKER, RC HORIZON LLC, DARREN HODIES & DARREN ROSS HODIES CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DEFAMATION/LIBEL AND 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SLANDER. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY PLEADS THE SUBSTANCE OF THE DEFAMATION AND THAT THE STATEMENTS WERE PUBLISHED TO THIRD PARTIES. THE DEMURRER TO THE 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE PLAINTIFF CANNOT ALLEGE THAT IT RELIED ON THE DEFENDANTS' STATEMENTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Continued To Jun-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: darryl m. yee, esq., 510.784.7300, for plaintiff donny chu construction, inc. dba dc construction; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs RICHARD CROCKER, RC HORIZON LLC, DARREN HODIES & DARREN ROSS HODIES CONSTRUCTION COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. The defamation allegations support the claim for punitives.Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: darryl m. yee, esq., 510.784.7300, for plaintiff donny chu construction, inc. dba dc construction; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs RICHARD CROCKER, RC HORIZON LLC, DARREN HODIES & DARREN ROSS HODIES CONSTRUCTION COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
is overruled as to the 11th cause of action for defamation/libel and 12th cause of action for slander. Plaintiff sufficiently pleads the substance of the defamation and that the statements were published to third parties. The demurrer to the 13th cause of action for fraud is sustained without leave to amend because plaintiff cannot allege that it relied on the defendants' statements. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
